title: Fiber and conductivity inference (FiberNet)
expected_band: from several activation maps the PINN recovers the fiber-angle field (RMSE a few tens of degrees at worst, better where the wavefronts sample multiple directions) and the anisotropy ratio cl/ct, with a deep-ensemble uncertainty on the fiber field

ladder.classical: assume rule-based / atlas fibers and literature CV (population, not patient-specific)
ladder.sota: anisotropic-Eikonal PINN recovering the fiber field + conductivity from multiple maps (FiberNet / PIEMAP)
ladder.novel: deep-ensemble epistemic uncertainty on the recovered fiber field (where to trust the inference)

engine.model: multi-map anisotropic-Eikonal inverse; shared fiber-angle net + learnable cl, ct; deep-ensemble UQ; ONNX export

references.cite: Grandits, Pezzuto, Sahli Costabal, Perdikaris, Pock, Plank, Krause (2021). Learning atrial fiber orientations and conductivity tensors from intracardiac maps using PINNs (PIEMAP)
Grandits et al. (2022). PINNs to learn cardiac fiber orientation from multiple electroanatomical maps. Engineering with Computers
